title: When You Feel Far From God
scripture_text: You will seek me and find me, when you seek me with all your heart.
reflection: The feeling of distance is often a sign of growth. The closer you get to the sun, the hotter it feels.
body:
The feeling of distance is not the same as distance. The sun does not move. You do.

Some seasons feel far from God because you are. Some seasons feel far from God because you are closer than you have ever been, and the heat is unfamiliar.

Both are normal. Both are temporary. The shepherd seeks the lost sheep, not the other way around. If you are moving at all, even one step, even in the wrong direction, you are still moving within His pasture.

He is not angry. He is not far. He is closer than the thought you are thinking right now.
prayer: Lord, I feel far. Pull me close. Or just let me feel You. Either is enough. Amen.
